VISTA_DOLL.title: Vista Doll
VISTA_DOLL.description:
Store discount [blue]30%[/blue]. 
When you enter the store, recover [blue]1[/blue] HP per [gold]20[/gold] gold. 
Gold from defeating enemies is doubled.
When the doll [i]leaves[/i], gain gold equal to [blue]10%[/blue] of your current gold.
While active, removing a card at the shop refunds the gold you paid.
[red]Hey, watch your doll![/red]
WXW_DOLL.title: WXW Doll
WXW_DOLL.description: When you would die, heal [green]1[/green] HP and gain [blue]999[/blue] block. You gain [blue]99[/blue] block per turn.(work once per combat)
BAIZEALER_DOLL.title: Baizealer Doll
BAIZEALER_DOLL.flavor: The stars will shine with you.
BAIZEALER_DOLL.description:
At the start of each combat, gain [blue]6[/blue] Thorns. 
Whenever you are attacked, deal [red]1[/red] damage to a random enemy [blue]6[/blue] times.
GALLOP_DOLL.title: Gallop Doll
GALLOP_DOLL.description:
At the start of each combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] [red]Strength[/red] per [blue]20%[/blue] HP lost. 
Whenever you lose HP in combat, heal [green]1[/green] HP per [blue]5[/blue] HP lost. 
At the end of each combat, heal [green]3[/green] HP.
DOGKING_DOLL.title: Dogking Doll
DOGKING_DOLL.flavor: "I'm hungry. I want to eat. Woof!"
DOGKING_DOLL.description:
On pickup, lose [red]3[/red] Max HP.
At the start of your turn, heal [green]1[/green] HP and gain [blue]2[/blue] Block.
When you take unblocked damage equal to or greater than [blue]20%[/blue] of your max HP during the enemy turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [purple]Intangible[/purple] at the start of your next turn.
RHINE_DOLL.title: Rhine Doll
RHINE_DOLL.description:
At combat start, attack damage is increased by [blue]10%[/blue].
At the start of your turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
If you end your turn with [red]0[/red] {Energy:energyIcons()}, attack damage is increased by an additional [blue]50%[/blue] next turn.
PANSY_DOLL.title: Pansy Doll
PANSY_DOLL.description: During the first [blue]3[/blue] turns of combat, the [blue]first[/blue] card you play each turn creates an [gold]Exhaust[/gold] copy into your draw pile. Each copy costs {Energy:energyIcons()} less for the rest of this combat.
SUPERCATBALL_A_G178.title: Nanain Catball
SUPERCATBALL_A_G178.description:
At the start of combat, [blue]Channel[/blue] a [blue]Plasma[/blue] Orb.
Whenever you pay {Energy:energyIcons()} on a card, gain [blue]{BlockPerEnergy}[/blue] Block.
I_ZERO_DOLL.title: Moonlit Zero Doll
I_ZERO_DOLL.flavor: [aqua]Between zero and one, under the moon.[/aqua]
I_ZERO_DOLL.description:
At the start of turn [blue]{NovaTurn}[/blue], deal [red]{NovaDamage}[/red] damage to ALL enemies.
Starting that same turn, at the start of each turn, add a [gold]Power[/gold] of a [blue]random[/blue] card color ([blue]Colorless included[/blue]) that costs {Energy:energyIcons()} to your hand.
For every [blue]{PowersPerEcho}[/blue] [gold]Power[/gold] cards you play, [blue]play one again[/blue].
WILISHA_DOLL.title: Wilisha Doll
WILISHA_DOLL.flavor: [red]"On the tenth strike, it's time to collect."[/red]
WILISHA_DOLL.description: For every [blue]{Attacks}[/blue] [gold]Attack[/gold] cards you play, deal [red]{Damage}[/red] damage to a random enemy and it loses [red]{HpLoss}[/red] HP.
CIFKA_DOLL.title: Cifka Doll
CIFKA_DOLL.description:
Upon pickup, remove all [gold]Curse[/gold] cards from your deck ([gold]Eternal[/gold] included). You [blue]can no longer receive[/blue] [gold]Curse[/gold] cards.
At the start of each combat, enemies lose [blue]{StrLoss}[/blue] [red]Strength[/red] and [blue]{DexLoss}[/blue] [green]Dexterity[/green] this turn.
For every [blue]{Attacks}[/blue] [gold]Attack[/gold] cards you play, apply [blue]{Weak}[/blue] [purple]Weak[/purple] to ALL enemies.
In Act 3, you are [blue]guaranteed[/blue] to encounter the [gold]Trial[/gold] event once.
